content_of_post_to_comment: Shine. And if it blinds them? Who gives a f*ck. You are not responsible for managing other people’s insecurities. You are not here to shrink, dim your light, lower your voice, or hide your success so someone else can feel comfortable. Shine anyway. The people meant for you won’t be threatened by your light. The rest can look away.
comment: There’s a difference between shrinking for other people’s comfort and refusing any feedback that feels uncomfortable. Sometimes the challenge is telling insecurity apart from a legitimate critique.
